title: clerodendrum serratum
intro: Clerodendrum serratum, also known as the cat's whisker, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum serratum include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of allergies. Herbal preparations of Clerodendrum serratum include tea, infusion, and tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
